## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Biologica and Growth X to discuss content production, review processes, and workflow improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=124.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New intro paragraphs show significant improvement; Elizabeth to review and provide feedback](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=790.0)
  - [Medical review bottleneck identified; exploring options for additional reviewers (NDs, OB/GYNs, GPs with women's health focus)](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Integrating new research data into knowledge base for article updates and generation](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Discussing byline implementation and multi-product mentions in articles](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and Review

  - [6 articles ready for review this week (e.g., anxiety during ovulation, essential vitamins)](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=730.0)
  - [Aiming for 1 article per week post-launch, scaling based on medical review capacity](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Exploring additional medical reviewer profiles (NDs, OB/GYNs, GPs with women's health focus) to alleviate bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [New intro paragraphs show improvement in narrative flow and context](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=830.0)

### Workflow and Tool Improvements

  - [Shotshit invite explained as topic/content tracking tool](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Airtable used for content management; considering adding priority column](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=341.0)
  - [Google Workspace issue preventing auto-population of email addresses to be addressed](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Exploring options to integrate new research data into knowledge base for article updates](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)

### Content Strategy and SEO

  - [Discussing potential blog post expansion from organic social content roundups](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)
  - [Importance of including recent dates (e.g., 2025) in articles for SEO benefits](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1430.0)
  - [Byline implementation discussed; recommendation to use individual names for better engagement](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)

### Technical Updates

  - [In-line images in active development by Katia](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
  - [Multiple product mentions now possible in articles](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
  - [Ingredient pages being built out for interlinking opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1773.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Elizabeth to review and provide feedback on new intro paragraphs](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=897.0)
  - [Matthew to explore options for additional medical reviewers](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Brian to export and prioritize content topics for Joey's review](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=316.0)
  - [Team to integrate new research data into knowledge base as it becomes available](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=964.0)
  - [Implement byline structure in articles (individual name recommended)](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1588.0)
  - [Address Google Workspace issue for team access](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [Continue development of in-line images and ingredient pages](https://fathom.video/share/WpTLSo8zU9RCywtggrsrkEs5scm7umk5?tab=summary&timestamp=1537.0)
